ItacPersonItem.Notes: Professor of anatomy. Among the founder of the Dodonei, invited to join the Academia naturae curiosorum in 1688, with nickname Seneca. member of the Ricovrati since 1678. For his biography, see Cesare Preti, `Grandi, Iacopo`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
